text:
Toileting Program: Response To Toileting Program Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the response to the trial toileting program (e.g., scheduled toileting, prompted voiding, or bladder training). -=Not assessed/no information
0=No improvement
1=Decreased wetness
2=Completely dry (continent)
9=Unable to determine or trial in progress
^=Blank (skip pattern)
261 H0200C_CRNT_TOILTG_PGM_CD H0200C_CRNT_TOILTG_PGM_CD H0200C Urinary Toileting Program: Current Toileting Program Code CHAR
